metadata.title: HITRUST Phase 1 Policy Suite - Compliance Evidence
metadata.issuer: MERGE Agency - Office of Information Security
metadata.scope: HITRUST r2 v11.5 Phase 1 - Policy Documentation

controls.description: AI Governance, Security & Acceptable Use Policy - drafted, MERGE template, pending Legal approval
controls.evidence: Draft complete (v2.0, 2026-02-21). HITRUST control mappings inline. 16 defined terms. Approved by leadership 2026-02-22. Pending Vanta upload.

controls.description: AI Governance Policy - NIST SA-3, RA-1, PL-1 coverage
controls.evidence: Policy addresses system development lifecycle for AI (SA-3), risk assessment policy (RA-1), and security planning policy (PL-1).

controls.description: Secure SDLC Policy - drafted, MERGE template, pending Legal approval
controls.evidence: Draft complete (v1.0, 2026-02-23). MERGE 9-section format. HITRUST and NIST control mappings. AI-specific SDLC sections included for HITRUST AI2.

controls.description: Secure SDLC Policy - HITRUST 09.aa Change Control coverage
controls.evidence: Policy establishes secure development lifecycle requirements including code review, testing gates, and change control procedures.

controls.description: CI/CD Pipeline Security Standard - drafted, MERGE template, pending Legal approval
controls.evidence: Draft complete (v1.0, 2026-02-23). Covers pipeline hardening, secrets management, deployment gates, artifact integrity. NIST SA-15, CM-3 mapped.

controls.description: Container Security Standard - drafted, MERGE template, pending Legal approval
controls.evidence: Draft complete (v1.0, 2026-02-23). Covers image scanning, runtime controls, base image currency, Dockerfile hardening. NIST CM-6, SI-7, SC-7, RA-5 mapped.

controls.description: IaC Security Standard - drafted, MERGE template, pending Legal approval
controls.evidence: Draft complete (v1.0, 2026-02-23). Covers Terraform security baselines, GCP configuration hardening, drift detection. NIST CM-2, CM-6 mapped.

controls.description: Dependency Management Procedure - drafted, MERGE template, pending Legal approval
controls.evidence: Draft complete (v1.0, 2026-02-23). Covers CVE remediation SLAs, license compliance, SBOM generation, supply chain risk. NIST SI-2, SR-3 mapped.

controls.description: Incident Response Policy - drafted, MERGE template, includes HITRUST AI2 Section 5.4 requirements
controls.evidence: Draft complete (v3.0, 2026-02-23). Modernized from MRG-023. 7 AI-specific incident types, Foresite MSSP integration, severity SLAs, MITRE ATLAS classification. NIST IR-1, IR-8 mapped.

controls.description: Incident Response Policy - HITRUST AI2 Section 5.4 AI Incident Response coverage
controls.evidence: Policy includes AI model compromise, data poisoning, adversarial input, unauthorized deployment, AI data exfiltration, AI supply chain compromise incident types. AI evidence preservation and model isolation procedures defined.

controls.description: Incident Response Policy - Foresite MSSP severity SLA integration
controls.evidence: Severity SLAs documented: Critical 15min, High 1hr, Medium 4hr, Low NBD. RACI matrix references Foresite 24/7 SOC.

controls.description: AI Risk Assessment Procedure - MISSING, required for HITRUST Phase 1
controls.evidence: No AI Risk Assessment procedure exists. Required by HITRUST AI2. Must be set up in Vanta with 180-day cadence. Deadline: April 2026.

controls.description: Incident Response Plan - MISSING, distinct from IR Policy
controls.evidence: Policy (POL-0013) exists but operational plan with contact trees, communication templates, and exercise schedule does not.
No standalone incident reporting procedure. POL-0013 references 24-hour reporting requirement but detailed procedure with forms and escalation paths not drafted.
No access control policy drafted. Required for HITRUST and NIST AC-1.
No audit logging policy drafted. Required for NIST AU-1.
No configuration management policy drafted. Required for NIST CM-1.
No contingency plan or disaster recovery procedure drafted. Required for NIST CP-1.

controls.description: Approved AI Governance Policy not yet uploaded to Vanta
controls.evidence: POL-0011 approved by leadership 2026-02-22 but not yet uploaded to Vanta GRC platform for evidence collection. Gap remains open until upload complete.
